title: 8Pcs Space Themed Balloons 3rd Birthday Decorations For Boy Space Themed Party Decorations, Astronaut Rocket Spaceship 3rd Birthday Balloons
features: Our 3rd birthday decorations are available in 4 themes: Space themed balloons, dinosaur balloon set, bear rainbow balloons, rainbow cloud balloon set. You can choose your favourite theme to celebrate the 3rd birthday for both boys and girls.

The 3rd birthday balloons are made of high quality aluminium foil and latex material, durable, lightweight, unbreakable and reusable. These party decorations are uniquely designed to provide beautiful and vivid decorations for your party.
The 3rd birthday decorations are easy to inflate and deflate, just pinch the inflation port after the balloon is inflated, you can easily inflate and deflate these beautiful balloon decorations.
The 3rd birthday decorations for boys and girls include a variety of different sized birthday balloons. Comes with straws and ribbons, no need to buy anything else.
The kids' party decorations can be hung on the wall, door, window, fence, perfect for decorating birthday parties, theme parties and make the birthday unforgettable memories.
description: Product description 4 themed sets to choose from The space theme aluminium foil balloon set has 8 balloons, including 1 x 40 inch number 3 balloon, 1 x 33 inch astronaut balloon, 1 x 29 inch rocket balloon, 1 x 25 inch space ship balloon, 1 x 22 inch earth balloon, 1 x 18 inch round balloon, 2 x 18 inch stars and moon. Dinosaur balloon set with 16 balloons: 1 dinosaur foil balloon, 1 32-inch foil number balloon, 1 round foil balloon, 1 star foil balloon, 12 12-inch printed latex balloons, 1* balloon, 1* straw. Bear rainbow balloon set contains 9 balloons: 1*32 inches number foil balloon, 1*35 inches bear foil balloon, 1*32 inches rainbow balloon, 2*12 inches yellow polka dot print latex balloons, 2*10 inches blue latex balloons, 1*10 inches brown latex balloons, 1*10 inches light yellow latex balloons. 1* balloon, 1* straw. Cloud balloon set has 7 balloons: Including 1*40 inches number balloon, 2*18 inches star balloon, 3 rainbow cloud balloons, 1 27 inches sun balloon. 1*balloon, 1*straw. Safety Warning Children can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Keep uninflated balloons away from children. Discard broken balloons at once.
